name: Beer Fritter Batter
recipeInstructions: This is good not only for vegetables, but for seafood and chicken, as well as for fruit fritters, such as banana, pineapple, and apple. Combine all ingredients in a blender or food processor and beat until the batter is smooth. Let the batter stand, covered, for 4 hours before using. Have vegetables well drained and patted dry if they have been washed. Dip in batter and fry in deep fat at 360 degrees until golden.
